title: An Act to Support Funding for Educational Programs and Opportunities
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Feb 10, 2026
last_house_action: 12/3/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on December 3, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 2/10/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
